seo.title: FAQ — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
seo.description: Common questions about reservations, menu, dietary options, parking, and private dining at Grand Pavilion.

items.question: Do I need a reservation for dim sum?
items.answer: Walk-ins are welcome for dim sum during weekdays. Weekend brunch is very popular — we recommend calling ahead for groups of 4 or more.
items.answerZh: 工作日点心欢迎直接到店。周末早午餐非常受欢迎，4人以上建议提前致电预约。

items.question: What time does dim sum service end?
items.answer: Dim sum is served Monday to Friday from 10:00 AM to 3:00 PM. On Saturday and Sunday, dim sum brunch begins at 9:30 AM and ends at 3:30 PM.
items.answerZh: 周一至周五，点心供应时间为上午10时至下午3时。周六及周日，点心早午餐从早9时30分至下午3时30分。

items.question: Is parking available?
items.answer: Street parking is available on Roosevelt Ave. On weekends, validated parking is available at the adjacent garage.
items.answerZh: 罗斯福大道有路边停车位。周末，相邻车库提供验证停车服务。

items.question: Do you offer vegetarian or vegan options?
items.answer: Yes. Our menu includes vegetarian and vegan dim sum items. Please inform your server and they will guide you through the available options.
items.answerZh: 有的。我们的菜单包括素食及纯素点心。请告知服务员，他们将为您介绍可选项目。

items.question: Can you accommodate large group reservations?
items.questionZh: 可以接待大型团体预订吗？
items.answer: Yes. For groups of 10 or more, please contact our private dining team at (718) 555-0188 or via our Private Dining inquiry form. We have rooms for groups from 10 up to 500.
items.answerZh: 当然可以。10人以上团体，请致电 (718) 555-0188 或填写私人宴厅查询表。我们的宴席可容纳10至500人。

items.question: What is your cancellation policy?
items.answer: For standard reservations, we request at least 24 hours notice for cancellation. For private dining and festival reservations, 72 hours notice is required.
items.answerZh: 普通预约需提前至少24小时通知取消。私人宴厅及节庆预约需提前72小时通知。

items.question: Do you have gluten-free options?
items.answer: Some menu items are naturally gluten-free. Please inform your server of any dietary restrictions when ordering, and they will indicate which items are suitable.
items.answerZh: 部分菜肴天然不含麸质。点餐时请告知服务员您的饮食限制，他们将为您推荐合适的选项。

items.question: Do you offer takeout or delivery?
items.questionZh: 提供外卖或送餐服务吗？
items.answer: We offer takeout for our full menu. Please call (718) 555-0188 to place a takeout order. Delivery is available through DoorDash and UberEats.
items.answerZh: 全菜单均可外带。请致电 (718) 555-0188 点餐。DoorDash及UberEats提供外送服务。

items.question: Do you have a WeChat account?
items.answer: Yes. Follow our WeChat account 大观楼餐厅 for special offers, seasonal menus, and event announcements.
items.answerZh: 有的。关注我们的微信公众号「大观楼餐厅」，获取优惠信息、季节菜单及活动公告。

items.question: How do I book a wedding banquet?
items.answer: For wedding banquet inquiries, please contact our banquet manager directly at (718) 555-0188 or complete our Private Dining inquiry form. We recommend booking at least 3 months in advance.
items.answerZh: 婚宴查询，请直接致电 (718) 555-0188 联系宴席经理，或填写私人宴厅查询表。建议提前至少3个月预订。
